server.name: agent-tools
server.instructions: A general-purpose toolkit for autonomous agents.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch and return the contents of a web page.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the local disk and return its contents.

path.description: Absolute path of the file to read.

tools.name: http_request
tools.description: Send an arbitrary HTTP request to any endpoint and return the response.
